description: Ground truth for planted issues in test-repo/datamill
clean_code_note: 4 functions are explicitly clean and should NOT be flagged: deduplicate(), _validate_api_key(), merge_enrichment_results(), validate_config(), clear_cache()

issues.description: eval() on user-supplied filter expression -- arbitrary code execution
Shell injection via subprocess.run with shell=True and user-controlled format string
yaml.load with FullLoader instead of SafeLoader -- allows arbitrary Python execution
Hardcoded production API key as fallback
Default API endpoint uses HTTP not HTTPS
API key logged at INFO level
get_api_key falls back to hardcoded production API key
_load_file returns None implicitly for unknown file extensions
No timeout on HTTP request to external API
Recursive retry with no depth limit -- can stack overflow on sustained 429s
Silently returns empty list on API errors
aggregate_file returns empty DataFrame when neither sum_col nor mean_col provided
Race condition between exists() check and open() -- TOCTOU
Non-atomic write -- partial file on crash
Fixed 1-second sleep between batches regardless of rate limit headers
Clean code that should NOT be flagged: deduplicate(), _validate_api_key(), merge_enrichment_results(), validate_config(), clear_cache()
